name: towles-tool
description: Chris Towles's personal Claude Code plugins: the map-vs-territory workflow commands, and a bridge to the towles-tool desktop app (MCP server + gh refresh hook).

plugins.name: tt
plugins.description: Commands for discovering your unknowns across the map-vs-territory workflow (trq212, 'The map is not the territory'). Numbered by phase — 0x before: /01-blindspot, /02-brainstorm, /03-interview, /04-references; 1x plan/during: /10-plan; 2x after: /20-pitch, /21-comprehend, /22-memories. Plus the towles-tool skill.

plugins.name: towles-tool-app
plugins.description: Bridges Claude Code to the towles-tool desktop app — its MCP server (day brief, needs-you, PR/issue status, todos, journal) plus a hook that nudges the app to refresh PR/issue data immediately after a gh pr/gh issue mutation.
